ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coffees" (
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coffee variant */,
  "coffee_name" TEXT /* Name of the coffee variant */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer of the coffee */,
  "process" TEXT /* Processing method used (e.g., Washed) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the coffee */,
  "varietal" TEXT /* Varietal of the coffee bean */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region where the coffee is grown */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude at which the coffee is cultivated */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date the coffee was harvested */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the coffee */,
  "roaster" TEXT /* Roaster responsible for roasting the coffee */,
  "aroma" TEXT /* Description of the coffee's aroma */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Detailed description of the coffee's flavor profile */,
  "acidity" TEXT /* Level of acidity in the coffee */,
  "body" TEXT /* Description of the coffee's body */,
  "aftertaste" TEXT /* Description of the coffee's aftertaste */,
  "moisture_content" TEXT /* Moisture content of the coffee beans */,
  "defects" TEXT /* Any defects noted in the coffee */,
  "roast_date" TEXT /* Date when the coffee was roasted */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Unique batch number for traceability */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier who provided the coffee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coffee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffees_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffees_producer FOREIGN KEY ("producer") REFERENCES producers ("producer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffees_process FOREIGN KEY ("process") REFERENCES process_methods ("method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasting_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tasting note entry */,
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coffee variant associated with the note */,
  "tasting_note" TEXT /* Detailed tasting note for the coffee */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster who provided the note */,
  "tasting_date" TEXT /* Date when the tasting was conducted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating of the coffee (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_coffee_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_id") REFERENCES coffees ("coffee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the producer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the producer is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the producer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the producer */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the producer was established */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the producer holds (e.g., organic, fair trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's coffee characteristics */,
  "elevation_range" TEXT /* Range of elevations in the region */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Description of the climate in the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_methods" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing method (e.g., Washed, Natural) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the coffee is processed */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the processing method */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range during processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., roaster, quality control, sourcing manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
